Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension22-Aug-2023Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
  • Achieve a 5% reduction in body weight to improve blood pressure control.
  • Limit daily sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams to support blood pressure control.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes per week of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity.
Diabetes self management plan17-Aug-2010Prediabetes
  • Patient will participate in diabetes self-management education and demonstrate understanding of blood glucose monitoring, healthy eating, and physical activity recommendations.
  • Patient will achieve and maintain HbA1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
  • Patient will achieve at least 5% weight loss from baseline to improve glycemic control and reduce risk of diabetes.
  • Patient will engage in at least 150 minutes per week of moderate-intensity physical activity.
Care plan16-Apr-1999-
Asthma self management03-Oct-1970Childhood asthma
  • Patient will demonstrate effective self-management of asthma symptoms and triggers.
